chapter_title.en: Chapter 33 – The free man marries the slave girl

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/72)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/72)
text: سَأَلْتُ عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَتَزَوَّجُ الْأَمَةَ قَالَ لَا إِلَّا أَنْ يُضْطَرَّ إِلَى ذَلِكَ.

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked about the man who marries the slave girl. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, except if he is desperate to that’.
en.sarwar: 6. Aban has narrated from Zurarah ibn ‘A‘yan who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the marriage of a slave-girl. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, unless it is an emergency.’”
